subject: [PATCH v3 1/3] fuse: don't clear folio uptodate on writethrough errors

2026-07-07.patch_summary: This patch prevents the clearing of the 'uptodate' flag on folios in the fuse writethrough error path, which can lead to confidential information being leaked to userspace. The change ensures that if a write fails or is short, the page cache folio keeps the data written by the application instead of reverting to the server's contents on the next read. This fix addresses an issue where clearing the 'uptodate' flag could bring down the whole machine due to invariant violations in the mm code.
